_publications._publicationTitle: Microarray analyses reveal regional astrocyte heterogeneity with implications for neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1)-regulated glial proliferation.

_contextSnippet: Using [3H]-thymidine incorporation, Nf1 inactivation resulted in ≥2-fold increase in proliferation of astroglial cells from CB, BS and ON
details: ≥2-fold increase in proliferation of astroglial cells from cerebellum, brainstem and optic nerve following Nf1 inactivation
